pf5_freeze.never_loosen_invariant: the significance machinery below is FROZEN; any change requires a deliberate re-freeze commit that updates this artifact AND the tamper test, never a runtime knob

oos_lockbox.pass_rule: per-trade significance AND excess Sharpe over buy-and-hold > 0 AND observed Sharpe >= quality floor
oos_lockbox.quality_floor_semantics: owner PRODUCT knob, additive-only (can never weaken the significance tests); CI-AWARE: observed < floor with the bar not ruled out -> UNEVALUATED (retryable, budget preserved — a true-1.0 edge measures <0.9 in ~44% of hold-outs); FAIL only when the CI upper bound rules the bar out (floor_miss, distinguishable from no-skill); per-run value recorded in the verdict extras

fb4_campaign_oos_control.adjustment: FIXED budget-sized Sidak: EVERY test faces t* = norm.ppf(1-(1-(1-alpha)^(1/BUDGET))) ~ 3.083 — review fix: the sequential (m=spent+1) scheme measured FWER 20.6% at the budget (4x target); the fixed bar holds family-wise false-PASS <= alpha exactly and is order-free (no within-run ordering games). Verified by a Monte-Carlo acceptance test.
fb4_campaign_oos_control.scope: per user (matches the coverage scope); the SERVER path uses the persistent oos_lockbox.db so the ledger accumulates across runs (review fix: the library ':memory:' default is honestly labeled within-run-only)
fb4_campaign_oos_control.depletion_semantics: campaign budget exhausted -> BudgetExhaustedError -> candidate stays honest-absent (UNEVALUATED path); volume can never buy more hold-out lottery tickets

rt2_advisory_stage1.status: PLUMBED BUT SEQUENCING-BLOCKED: a soft_dsr request is REFUSED (ValueError) until the MON1 power canary (Track 6) exists and proves the DSR gate vacuous — the spec's third precondition alongside OOS-on and FB4-active
rt2_advisory_stage1.guard: when unblocked: honored ONLY in robustness mode with the OOS lockbox enabled; regime mode keeps DSR HARD regardless
rt2_advisory_stage1.effect: DSR FAIL -> recorded weakness (could-be-luck label), candidate proceeds to the FB4-controlled lockbox; all other hard gates unchanged

coverage_v2.search_size_rule: max(raw campaign visited-cell count, N_run) - no correlation reduction sanctioned (B5); gate-level monotone floor

d1_resolution.meaning: the OOS lockbox RECORDS whether the observed hold-out Sharpe clears the owner's product bar (CI-aware, see quality_floor_semantics) — it is the honest arbiter for the 0.9-1.0 band but NOT a powered confirmer of it (a hold-out cannot reliably distinguish 0.7 from 0.9; PF1 shows the in-sample gate has zero power there at any N). The in-sample DSR gate stays maximally strict as the integrity filter and fresh-data rationing doorman. The actual 0.9-band SELECTION power arrives with FB4 top-K rationing.
d1_resolution.stage1_configurability: NOT a threshold slider (never-loosen invariant); arrives as top-K fresh-data rationing with FB4 campaign-wide OOS multiplicity control; owner band for the ranking cutoff recorded as in-sample ~2-3
d1_resolution.evidence_hash_scope: sha256 of the on-disk file bytes (script writes bytes, no newline translation); asserted by test_gate_config_freeze.py

pf_status.PF1: DONE - coverage-v2-power-curve.json (zero size at null everywhere; power in the D1 band = 0 in-sample at every N; vacuity is V-driven as predicted)
pf_status.PF2_PF3: PARTIAL - RT1 + market-mode-stripped estimators built + synthetic-validated (known-K with shared beta); gate-time measured reduction stays UNWIRED pending full validation on real visited families
